_comment: Slide blocks selected by rules. Generator passes the resolved list to Claude so it writes copy ONLY for included slides.

title.name: Title
title.hint: Product name + one-line tagline tuned to client + their logo placeholder

problem.name: The Problem
problem.hint: Client's specific pain in their use case. 3 sharp bullets + 1 stat.

solution.name: Solution
solution.hint: What Finn is in one sentence, then 3 value props.

roi.name: ROI
roi.hint: Human-vs-Finn cost framing. Write ONLY headline+accent+subhead. The cost comparison numbers are injected automatically — leave bullets empty [].

proof.name: Proof
proof.hint: A customer result framing. Write ONLY headline+accent+subhead. The real customer quote + logo are injected automatically — leave bullets empty [].

demo.name: Live Demo
demo.hint: Walk through one real call: caller profile, what Finn does, the outcome. 3 bullets as Caller/Finn/Outcome.

capabilities.name: Capabilities
capabilities.hint: 6 capability tiles relevant to the use case.

dashboard.name: Dashboard
dashboard.hint: What the client's team learns from analytics: real metrics they can act on (pickup by segment, conversion by category, searchable transcripts, sentiment).

integrations.name: Integrations
integrations.hint: Calendar, CRM, telephony tied to client stack if known.

compliance.name: Compliance & Security
compliance.hint: Data residency, audit, number health. Region-specific.

market.name: Market
market.hint: TAM/SAM for voice AI in client's vertical. Investor framing.

traction.name: Traction
traction.hint: Logos, usage, growth. Placeholders for real numbers.

results.name: Results
results.hint: Outcome metrics: cost/call, pickup rate, time saved.

objections.name: Why Finn
objections.hint: Differentiators vs named competitor / vs human agents.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.hint: Plan tiers, per-min rate, credits. Currency by region.

cta.name: Next Steps
cta.hint: Clear CTA tuned to decision stage.
